Package com.wip.service

Interface ShipmentService

All Known Implementing Classes:
ShipmentServiceImpl
public interface ShipmentService
Service interface for managing shipments.

Defines the contract for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting shipment records in the Courier Tracking System.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ShipmentDto
    addShipment(Long parcelId)
    Creates a new shipment for an existing parcel.
    void
    deleteShipment(Long id)
    Deletes a shipment from the system.
    List<ShipmentDto>
    getAllShipments()
    Retrieves all shipments in the system.
    ShipmentDto
    getShipmentById(Long id)
    Retrieves a shipment by its unique ID.
    ShipmentDto
    getShipmentByParcelId(Long parcelId)
    Retrieves the shipment associated with a specific parcel.
    ShipmentDto
    getShipmentByTrackingNumber(String trackingNumber)
    Retrieves a shipment by its tracking number.
    List<ShipmentDto>
    search(String keyword)
    Searches for shipments using a keyword.
    ShipmentDto
    updateShipment(Long id, ShipmentDto shipmentDto)
    Updates shipment details such as dates and location.
    ShipmentDto
    updateShipmentLocation(Long id, String currentLocation)
    Updates the current location of a shipment.

  • Method Details

    • addShipment

      ShipmentDto addShipment(Long parcelId)
      Creates a new shipment for an existing parcel.
      Parameters:
      parcelId - the ID of the parcel to ship
      Returns:
      the created shipment details

    • getAllShipments

      List<ShipmentDto> getAllShipments()
      Retrieves all shipments in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of all shipments

    • getShipmentById

      ShipmentDto getShipmentById(Long id)
      Retrieves a shipment by its unique ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment
      Returns:
      the shipment details

    • getShipmentByTrackingNumber

      ShipmentDto getShipmentByTrackingNumber(String trackingNumber)
      Retrieves a shipment by its tracking number.
      Parameters:
      trackingNumber - the unique alphanumeric tracking number
      Returns:
      the shipment details

    • updateShipmentLocation

      ShipmentDto updateShipmentLocation(Long id, String currentLocation)
      Updates the current location of a shipment.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment
      currentLocation - the new location of the shipment
      Returns:
      the updated shipment details

    • updateShipment

      ShipmentDto updateShipment(Long id, ShipmentDto shipmentDto)
      Updates shipment details such as dates and location.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment
      shipmentDto - the updated shipment details
      Returns:
      the updated shipment details

    • getShipmentByParcelId

      ShipmentDto getShipmentByParcelId(Long parcelId)
      Retrieves the shipment associated with a specific parcel.
      Parameters:
      parcelId - the unique identifier of the parcel
      Returns:
      the associated shipment, or null if not found

    • deleteShipment

      void deleteShipment(Long id)
      Deletes a shipment from the system.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shipment to delete

    • search

      List<ShipmentDto> search(String keyword)
      Searches for shipments using a keyword.
      Parameters:
      keyword - the search string
      Returns:
      a list of shipments matching the criteria
